calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Order To Set Aside Dismissal Filed On June 3,2009
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Order To Set Aside Dismissal Filed On June 3, 2009 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
